name: 45-Degree Bicycle Twisting Crunch
shortDescription: A twisting crunch performed at a 45-degree angle to target the obliques and rectus abdominis.
instructions: Lie flat on your back with hands behind your head and legs raised at a 45-degree angle. Bring your right elbow toward your left knee while extending the opposite leg, then alternate sides in a pedaling motion.
steps: Lie down with your hands behind your head and legs extended upwards at about a 45-degree angle.
Engage your core and lift your shoulders off the ground.
Twist your upper body, bringing your right elbow toward your left knee as you extend your right leg.
Return to the starting position and repeat to the opposite side.
Continue alternating sides in a controlled, twisting motion.
breathing: Exhale during the twist, inhale as you return to center.
